# boot

Boot target device/simulator

## Usage

```bash
agent-device boot [--headless]
```

## Session Requirement

Does not require an active session.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- None

## Allowed Flags

- `--headless`: Boot: launch Android emulator without a GUI window

## Platform Coverage

| Target | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| iOS sim | Yes |
| iOS device | Yes |
| tvOS sim | Yes |
| macOS | No |
| Android emu | Yes |
| Android device | Yes |
| Android TV | Yes |
